prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约11294→12067→11731→15402→16357名，整体呈持续后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4626名；2025年基准位次约16357名，较 2024年再后移955名，下行趋势明显；该校在河南省理科/物理类招生计划2021年88人、2022年84人、2023年93人、2024年95人、2025年101人，逐年小幅扩招；2 026年计划增至120人，较2025年扩招约18.8%，扩招幅度为近年最大，对位次有推后效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学（威海）为985、211、双一流高校，隶属山东大学办 学体系；软科主榜山东大学2021–2026年稳定排名约第22名，学校层次高、品牌效应强；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及山东大学历史学伴事件舆情延续；抖 音热度方面，山东大学总排名第20（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；未见明显投档断档记录；依托山东大学学科体系，拥有数学A+、中国语言文学 A、外国语言文学A、控制科学与工程A、马克思主义理论A等优势学科，以及法学A-、应用经济学A-、物理学A-、软件工程A-等一批A类学科，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等理科热门专业持续高热推荐，推高报考热度；本省2026年考生总数约120万人（数据标注不确定），按近年比例估算物理类 约73.4万人，较2025年55.5万人增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；山东大学（威海）位于山东省威海市，属东部沿海地区，对河南考 生有一定地域吸引力；该校在河南招生计划占比较高，2025年物理类101人属较大规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约18.8%的推后效应、本省 物理类考生规模增长约32%带来的竞争加剧，以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热对报考的拉动，在2025年基准16357名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约18404名， 区间17904–18904名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 11294 → 12067 → 11731 → 15402 → 16357, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4626 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 16357, a further backward shift of 955 positions compared to 2024, indicating a clear downward trend; the university's enrollment plan in Henan Province for science/physics category was 88 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 93 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 101 in 2025, with a gradual small expansion; the plan for 2026 increases to 120, an expansion of about 18.8% compared to 2025, the largest expansion in recent years, which has a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University (Weihai) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, belonging to the Shandong University system; on the Soft Science main ranking, Shandong University has been stable at around 22nd place from 2021 to 2026, with a high university level and strong brand effect; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving the ongoing public opinion of the Shandong University historical companion incident; in terms of Douyin popularity, Shandong University ranks 20th overall (high heat), with large short video exposure and relatively high application attention; no obvious admission gaps have been recorded; relying on Shandong University's discipline system, it has advantageous disciplines such as Mathematics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, as well as a group of A-class disciplines including Law A-, Applied Economics A-, Physics A-, Software Engineering A-, with strong disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular science majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, driving up application enthusiasm; the total number of candidates in the province for 2026 is about 1.2 million (data annotation uncertain), with the physics category estimated at about 734,000 based on recent proportions, an increase of about 32% compared to 555,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Shandong University (Weihai) is located in Weihai City, Shandong Province, in the eastern coastal region, which has some regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Henan accounts for a relatively high proportion, with 101 in the physics category in 2025 being a relatively large scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the backward effect of a significant 18.8% expansion in 2026, the intensified competition due to a 32% increase in the number of physics category candidates in the province, and the pull of high heat for popular majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information on applications, based on the 2025 baseline of 16357, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 18404, with a range of 17904–18904.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 17904–18904, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 17900), focus on top majors like Electronic Information and Mathematics; if the ranking is near the upper limit (e.g., around 18900), use Tier 3 majors like Marine Science and Business Administration as safety, and aim for Tier 2 majors like Economics.
